channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Tax and MOT Expired, 10th April
item.description:
This vehicle is on bricks, has no wheels, rear light clusters have been removed and the front of the vehicle has been dismantled, no bumper, radiator grill or headlights. Tax due 31/05/2025 Mot expired on 22/02/2025. Located in a parking bay in Woolf Close
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woolf Close, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Has no tax or MOT, 10th April
item.description:
No tax and MOT

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Witherston Way, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead Fox in garden, 10th April
item.description:
Dead fox in back garden.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Blackheath Park, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge cArdboard box with name and address of Croydon residents, 10th April
item.description:
Not sure how a box from Croydon got to my street but the full name and address of box is on it

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sheringham Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog poo remains and more has been added, 10th April
item.description:
The original dog poo is still there and has not been removed. More dog poo has been added. There is a lot by the street light between 26 and 28. Please can you remove this waste?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 26, Rodwell Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Excessive rubbish outside Forest Hill Kebab, 10th April
item.description:
These commercial bins are always overflowing and block the pavement on Forest Hill Road. Black bags are often left on the curb and are opened by foxes etc. these bins need to be placed somewhere else and collected more frequently.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 108, Forest Hill Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole in the middle of the road. Outside 21 - 23, 10th April
item.description:
Pothole in the middle of the road. outside 21 - 23
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sheridan Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken road sign, 10th April
item.description:
Residents parking road sign appears to have been damaged by vehicle.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Theed Street, Waterloo, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Harvist Road junction with Kingswood speed cushion, 10th April
item.description:
Speed cushion - pothole Requires repair

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Harvist Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Accumulated rubbish, 10th April
item.description:
Lots of rubbish on the path in the cut leading to Henwick road school via winchcombe gardens.sun lounger ,oven.clothes .shopping trolley ,table chairs and other stuff
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Winchcomb Gardens, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped doors, 10th April
item.description:
Someone has dumped two internal doors on the pavement along Norway Gate, opposite the entrance into Plover Way. Please could these be removed. Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Norway Gate, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping of rubbish due to broken fence, 10th April
item.description:
People are fly tipping in this area and the children have broken the fence and climbing around the back bringing out more rubbish from the back of the houses and tree areas

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ballast Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lime bike left in pedestrian footpath blocking access completely on Churchyard passage, 10th April
item.description:
I had to drag useless lump to road to unblock passage way. Useless company

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4-8, Ribbon Dance Mews, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter, 10th April
item.description:
Needs a clean bottles cans litter in footpath
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6, Francis Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Whole pile of stuff including DVLA wheel clamp unlawfully removed, 10th April
item.description:
Stuff unloaded from blue van

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 75, Camberwell Church Street, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish all over payment, 10th April
item.description:
Top of Waverley Road privately rented house rubbish all over pavement as usual.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Waverley Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: All lights off and no traffic management in place, 10th April
item.description:
Huge danger to public and drivers No crossing s or lights working for cars and no traffic management during works can't be right

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Buckingham Palace Road, Victoria, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: All lights put, 10th April
item.description:
Sydenham Road by sunnydene street. Traffic lights all out
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 208, Sydenham Road, Perry Vale, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter, 10th April
item.description:
Bins overflowing with rubbish. Funfair from 10- 26th expect increase use. Please increase emptying as these bins seem to be aways overflowing into the street and park

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Anerley Hill, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household waste dumped on the street, 10th April
item.description:
The street bin has been moved and waste is collecting around its new location and attracting vermin

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Braganza Street, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
